title: zapoteca costaricensis
intro: Zapoteca costaricensis, a species of flowering plant in the legume family, is native to Central America and is also known as the "Costa Rican zapote" or "zapote de Costa Rica". The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Zapoteca costaricensis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating gastrointestinal issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Zapoteca costaricensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support overall well-being and promote a healthy digestive system.
